name: Blue Corn Casserole (Santa Fe)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked and drained pinto beans
2 1/2 cups grated cheese or tofu equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the vegetable oil and blue cornmeal.
2. Add the chopped onion, baking powder, cooked pinto beans, cumin, tomato sauce, chili powder, grated cheese (or tofu), water, and green onions. Stir until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. If desired, top with picante sauce and chopped green chilies before serving.
